creator: olivierw1+bugzilla-freebsd@hotmail.com
text:
Yes, I'm aware Squid 4.x is EOL but it was very stable, at least for me.

My message wasn't intended to discourage users to try Squid 5.13, it was more to know if I was the only one impacted or if there are other people who have crashes (and to know what we should do if I am not alone).

I hope your bug will be fixed soon! :-)
